title: Maksim Korzh
text: Home * People * Maksim Korzh Maksym Korzh [1] Maksim (Maksym) Korzh , alias Code Monkey King, an Ukrainian freelancer and computer chess programmer. As a computer chess aficionado and chess programming enthusiast, he learned JavaScript , Python and C languages, as well as x86 Assembly . He started freelancing at Upwork but soon moved to YouTube to create a channel dedicated to web scraping and web development [2] , and further combined his profession with his computer chess activity for a YouTube channel dedicated to chess programming - where he introduced chess programming topics along with the development of various chess engines for didactic purpose [3] .
